text: What if your body sent messages that could start a storm? Cytokines are like text messages for immune cells, guiding responses to infections. But what happens when those messages go haywire? In a cytokine storm, excessive signals can overwhelm the body, leading to severe inflammation. This dysregulation may contribute to conditions like COVID-19, but research is ongoing. Want to understand your immunity better? Follow for more science insights!
